name: @bpmn-react/registry
description: Headless version governance for bpmn-react: a queryable registry of diagram versions with temporal validity, publication channels/environments, dual changelog and execution pinning (run-binding). Zero runtime dependencies.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
